ticket: I was charged twice this month and your support team has not replied for five days. I am going to post this on social media if this is not fixed today.
justification: Customer reports duplicate charge (billing problem) and expresses angry tone with a threat to go public, raising urgency.

ticket: The export button stopped working after your latest update. Our reporting team is blocked.
justification: Customer reports a functional defect that halts a business process, requiring immediate technical attention.

ticket: Can you add approval workflows before invoices are submitted?
justification: Customer is requesting a new capability; not urgent but valuable for future releases.

ticket: We need confirmation that our customer data is not being used to train your AI models.
justification: Customer raises a data‑privacy/compliance issue that must be addressed promptly.

ticket: My admin account is locked and the password reset email never arrives.
justification: Customer cannot access an admin account and is not receiving reset emails, blocking their work.
